subject: Heliolisk, an electric lizard Pokémon with a fanned frill, standing alert on rocky terrain
description: A bipedal lizard creature stands in an alert, upright posture on rocky terrain. The creature has a yellow and orange body with a distinctive wide frill fanned out around its neck and head, giving it a sunburst or solar-disc quality. The background features warm earth tones — sandy and rocky ground with a warm-colored sky. The overall feeling is energetic and sun-baked, and the creature's posture reads as watchful and ready.
foreground: yellow-orange lizard creature with fanned frill standing on rocky ground
